query:
SELECT 
  o.name,
  o.slug,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r.questionId) as response_count
FROM organizations o
LEFT JOIN responses r ON o.organizationId = r.organizationId
WHERE o.status = 'active' AND o.name IN ('Baycare', 'Boulder Community Health', 'JCRHC')
GROUP BY o.id, o.name, o.slug
ORDER BY o.name;
